name: Penne Salad with Tomatoes Goat Cheese & Basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in boiling water according to package instructions or until firm to the bite. Rinse with cold water. Drain and place in serving bowl.
2. Add tomatoes, garlic, oil, vinegar, cheese, basil, olives, and pepper to taste. Toss until cheese begins to melt.
Tips:
- Apple cider vinegar can replace balsamic vinegar.
- Try feta cheese instead of goat cheese.
- Use juicy ripe tomatoes to add enough liquid to the salad.
- Make ahead: Prepare the tomato dressing early in the day to marinate. Do not toss until ready to serve.
